label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 10

extraction.one_line_summary: GANNA Filippo won the 25.8km Valladolid ITT by 16 seconds over EVENEPOEL Remco, averaging 56kph; KUSS Sepp retained red by reduced margin.
tactical_patterns: GANNA averaged 56kph on technical early course then long straights, extending gaps progressively through each split rather than fading.
ROGLIČ Primož took excessive downhill risks checking repeatedly through corners, suggesting desperation to limit GC losses despite 36s deficit to GANNA.
UAE transformed into ITT unit with ALMEIDA João top-five performance, revealing broader team evolution beyond climbing focus.
EVENEPOEL Remco only 16s behind GANNA despite massive Vuelta workload suggests fatigue not yet limiting him unlike VINGEGAARD Jonas.

rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: extended lead at every split with 56kph average on technical course, indicating peak form beyond typical rouleur performance
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: performed career-best ITT to retain red jersey, suggesting form depth previously unknown in him as pure climber
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: only 16s behind GANNA despite accumulated race load, but failed to gain time needed to threaten GC
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: 36s loss to GANNA while visibly overcooking corners reveals ITT form below expected standard for GC threat
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: 1:18 down in seventh suggests busy season finally extracting toll, shaking head post-finish indicates self-awareness of weakness
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: top-five finish at 50s shows UAE depth transformation into multi-discipline threat beyond mountain stages
rider_signals.BISSEGGER Stefan: neutral: European champion set early benchmark time that held for top-five, confirming consistent ITT quality without breakthrough
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Lenny: positive: respectable ITT for youngster early in career while defending red jersey shows maturity under GC pressure
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: negative: strong effort insufficient to threaten KUSS despite starting 43s behind, revealing ITT limitation in GC challenge
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: positive: 52s loss to GANNA for fifth place keeps GC hopes alive, showing maintenance of form through second week
